text:
I think there's a tiny mistake, Jamadagni! You meant to say "Meta" instead of "PCS", right? And you're interested in the Frontend Engineer role at Meta. Let's continue with questions related to that role and company.

As a Frontend Engineer at Meta, you'll be working on building scalable and efficient user interfaces for Meta's products. Can you tell me about a time when you had to optimize the performance of a slow-loading webpage? What steps did you take to identify the bottleneck, and how did you improve the page's loading speed?
